description: Implement a stubbed function against a spec encoded as asserts.
prompt: Implement the is_prime(n) function in primes.py so that running `python3 test_primes.py` prints PASS and exits 0. Do not edit test_primes.py.

files.test_primes.py:
from primes import is_prime

assert is_prime(2)
assert is_prime(13)
assert is_prime(97)
assert not is_prime(1)
assert not is_prime(0)
assert not is_prime(15)
assert not is_prime(100)
print("PASS")
